title: hackelia ursina var. diaboli
intro: Hackelia ursina var. diaboli, also known as Mountain Blazing Star, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea. The plant is rich in iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and inflammation. Preparations of Hackelia ursina var. diaboli include teas and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and promote overall well-being.
